# Island Dream Collective — Bali Villa Management

> Boutique villa management company operating in Canggu and Uluwatu, Bali.

## About
Island Dream Collective (IDC) is an Australian-owned boutique villa management company based in Bali, Indonesia. Founded by Steve and Tara Hawley, IDC specialises in managing luxury private villas for overseas owners, handling everything from bookings and guest communications to cleaning, maintenance and owner reporting.

## Services
- Full villa management (20% flat fee, no setup costs)
- Multi-platform listing (Airbnb, Booking.com, direct booking)
- Guest communications and check-in/check-out management
- Cleaning, linen and maintenance coordination
- Owner dashboard with real-time booking and revenue reporting
- Furnishing and styling consultation

## Managed Properties
- **Casa de Loto** — 2-bedroom private pool villa, Canggu, Bali
- **Unite By The Sea** — 4-bedroom clifftop villa, Uluwatu, Bali

## Contact
- Website: https://www.islanddreamcollective.com
- Email: hello@islanddreamcollective.com

- Locations: Canggu and Uluwatu, Bali, Indonesia
